# @witchcraft/ui

> Vue component library built on Reka UI with Tailwind CSS, themable via Metamorphosis.

## Documentation Sets

- [Full Documentation](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/llms-full.txt): Full documentation of the application

## Landing

- [@witchcraft/ui](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui): Opinionated, batteries-included Vue/Nuxt component library built on Reka UI with Tailwind CSS.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/getting-started): Opinionated, batteries-included Vue/Nuxt component library built on Reka UI with Tailwind CSS.
- [Installation (Nuxt)](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/getting-started/installation-nuxt): Install and configure @witchcraft/ui in your Nuxt project.
- [Installation (Standalone)](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/getting-started/installation-standalone): Use @witchcraft/ui without Nuxt.
- [Usage](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/getting-started/usage): Learn how to use and customize @witchcraft/ui components.
- [WAsyncValidatedInput](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-async-validated-input): This is for usage with @witchcraft/nuxt-utils's useAsyncValidation for handling
complex validation scenarios (client+server) as in the case of a username.
- [WAuth](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-auth)
- [WAuthLocalUser](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-auth-local-users): See WAuth for storybook stories.
- [WButton](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-button)
- [WCheckbox](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-checkbox)
- [WColorInput](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-color-input)
- [WColorPicker](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-color-picker)
- [WCombobox](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-combobox)
- [WDarkModeSwitcher](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-dark-mode-switcher)
- [WDatePicker](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-date-picker)
- [WFileInput](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-file-input)
- [WIcon](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-icon)
- [WMetamorphosisTheme](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-metamorphosis-theme): This is a slightly experimental component. Not all types of themes are supported, but the
most common will work. There is no save/load mechanism yet, though you can hook
into metamorphosis's internal events to get notified of theme changes.
- [WMultiValues](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-multi-values)
- [WNotification](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-notification)
- [WNotifications](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-notifications)
- [WNumberInput](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-number-input)
- [WPagination](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-pagination)
- [WPalette](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-palette)
- [WPopover](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-popover)
- [WPopup](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-popup)
- [WProgressBar](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-progress-bar)
- [WRecorder](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-recorder)
- [WSimpleInput](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-simple-input)
- [WTable](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-table)
- [WTooltip](https://witchcraftjs.github.io/ui/components/w-tooltip)
